en.title: A single path from template to PDF.

steps.title: Model
steps.body: Define input variables per template and manage variants with JSON Schema validation.

steps.title: Author
steps.body: Drag blocks in the visual editor with conditional logic, loops, and live PDF preview.

steps.title: Promote
steps.body: Freeze immutable versions and assign them to staging or production environments.

steps.title: Govern
steps.body: Gate releases behind reviewer approvals per tenant with full audit trails.

steps.title: Render
steps.body: Call the REST API or batch jobs to render PDFs in milliseconds.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.body: Push artifacts via storage adapters or webhooks to complete the pipeline.

nl.title: Een enkel pad van template naar PDF.

steps.title: Modelleer
steps.body: Definieer input variabelen per template en beheer varianten met JSON Schema validatie.

steps.title: Ontwerp
steps.body: Sleep blokken in de visuele editor met conditionele logica, loops, en live PDF preview.

steps.title: Promoveer
steps.body: Bevries onveranderlijke versies en wijs ze toe aan staging of productie omgevingen.

steps.title: Beheer
steps.body: Bewaak releases met reviewer goedkeuringen per tenant met volledige audit trails.

steps.title: Render
steps.body: Roep de REST API of batch jobs aan om PDF's in milliseconden te renderen.

steps.title: Lever
steps.body: Push artifacts via storage adapters of webhooks om de pipeline te voltooien.
